final:
module top_module(
	 input [3:0] in_data1,
    input [3:0] in_data2,
    output [3:0] out_data,
    output cy
    );wire [4:0]rslt;
	 
	 assign rslt = in_data1+in_data2,
			  cy = rslt[4],
			  out_data = rslt[3:0];

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out_data <= ~in_data1; cy <= ~in_data2;
    end
  end

endmodule
